evals.expected_output: A type: word YAML entry for 可持续发展 with all required fields including examples with zh/pinyin/english/de, character analysis with simplified field, and note with usage info.

assertions.name: correct_type_word
assertions.description: Entry uses type: word (not vocabulary or other)

assertions.name: hsk_quoted_single_digit
assertions.description: hsk field is a quoted single digit like "5" not "5-6" or unquoted

assertions.name: examples_have_four_fields
assertions.description: All examples have zh, pinyin, english, and de fields
assertions.check: each example block contains zh:, pinyin:, english:, de:

assertions.name: no_extra_text
assertions.description: Output is only YAML, no prose explanation before or after
assertions.check: response is only a fenced yaml block with no surrounding text

assertions.name: note_field_used_not_explanations
assertions.description: word type uses note: not explanations:
assertions.check: output contains 'note: |' and does not contain 'explanations:'

evals.prompt: Ich habe Heimweh nach meiner Familie.
evals.expected_output: A type: sentence YAML entry with source_de, simplified, traditional, pinyin, english, explanations, grammar_structures, similar_sentences, and word_analyses for key vocabulary.

assertions.name: has_source_de
assertions.description: source_de field included since input was German

assertions.name: uses_explanations_not_note
assertions.description: sentence type uses explanations: not note:
assertions.check: output contains 'explanations:' and not a top-level 'note:'

assertions.name: has_word_analyses
assertions.description: word_analyses included with key vocab (heimweh = 想家 or 乡愁)

assertions.name: examples_have_four_fields
assertions.description: All examples have zh, pinyin, english, and de fields
assertions.check: each example block contains zh:, pinyin:, english:, de:

assertions.name: no_extra_text
assertions.description: Output is only YAML, no prose explanation
assertions.check: response is only a fenced yaml block

evals.expected_output: A type: chengyu YAML entry with note, examples (4 fields each), synonyms, antonyms, and word_analyses for component words 马, 到, 成, 功.
